response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, which are mandatory requirements; their career is centered on web, mobile, and DLang/TypeScript projects with no evidence of financial systems development or SQL Server/Oracle expertise.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No documented C++ experience on Windows platform as required
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience listed but no context of SQL Server or Oracle usage in financial systems

key_factors.factor: SQL skills unverified in financial context
